post_deploy: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates gnupg git && curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
npm install -g openclaw@latest && command -v openclaw && openclaw --version 2>&1 | tail -1

setsid nohup openclaw gateway > /var/log/openclaw.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & for i in $(seq 1 30); do code=$(curl -sS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 2 http://127.0.0.1:18789/__openclaw__/canvas/ 2>/dev/null || echo 000); [ "$code" != "000" ] && { echo "openclaw gateway up (HTTP $code) after ${i}s"; exit 0; }; sleep 1; done; echo 'gateway did not bind 18789 within 30s'; echo '--- /var/log/openclaw.log ---'; cat /var/log/openclaw.log 2>&1 | tail -60; echo '--- ps ---'; ps -ef 2>&1 | grep -E 'openclaw|node' | grep -v grep | head -10; exit 1
